title: KINDTREE AUTISM ROCKS FRIENDS & FAMILY CAMP - 211info
text: KINDTREE KINDTREE AUTISM ROCKS FRIENDS & FAMILY CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Long weekend camp provides optional activities including crafts, swimming, great food, a woodsy outdoor setting, karaoke, a talent show, campfires, outdoor movies, games, face painting, nature walks, a family feeling, and more. Eligibility: Persons with autism and other intellectual disabilities and their friends and families Hours: Varies by service occurs annually in late August. Email (541) 780-6950 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 780-6950 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Register online between April- June FEES: Visit website and register online. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Camps * Autism Spectrum Disorder Camps * Intellectual Disabilities General Recreational Activities/Sports * Autism Spectrum Disorder General Recreational Activities/Sports * Intellectual Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - AUTISM PEER SUPPORT GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
